title: iteration.json
description: Per-iteration manifest for dual execution (Phase C'). Sits at <workspace>/iteration-N/iteration.json.

skill_path.description: Absolute path to the candidate skill directory (contains SKILL.md).

evals_path.description: Absolute path to the eval set JSON file (must match evals.schema.json).

agent_prompt.description: Absolute path to the executor template. Should support {{USER_INPUT}} and {{SKILL_CONTENT}} placeholders. Defaults to agents/executor.md when omitted.

baseline_type.description: Which baseline to run alongside with_skill. Use old_skill to compare against a prior snapshot.

old_skill_path.description: Absolute path to a prior snapshot of the skill. Required when baseline_type is 'old_skill'.

runs_per_configuration.description: Number of independent runs per (eval, side) combination. Higher values reduce noise at the cost of time.

iteration.description: Optional informational iteration number; the harness derives the directory from --iteration.

notes.description: Free-form author notes about this iteration (motivation, change list).
